mapper.select: SELECT id, application_id, step_name, state_json, completed_at, created_at FROM approval_step_checkpoint WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} AND step_name=#{stepName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval_step_checkpoint(application_id, step_name, state_json, completed_at, created_at) VALUES(#{applicationId}, #{stepName}, #{stateJson}, #{completedAt}, #{createdAt})
